What's Driving Your Growth?

Every dollar of sales change can be traced to one of four drivers. Did you grow because more stores carry you? Because stores sell faster? Because you have more items on the shelf? Or because your price went up? The bars below break down your total sales change into these four pieces. Green bars helped you grow. Red bars held you back.

How Do You Stack Up Across Retailers?

Cross-retailer comparison reveals where Counter is thriving and where there is room to grow. Velocity gaps between retailers open the conversation about placement, assortment, and promotional support. This view shows ALL retailers regardless of header selection.

What Should You Do Next?

This auto-generated brief synthesizes all the data above into the three things a retail buyer needs to decide: which brands to expand, which brands are at risk of deletion, and which competitors are gaining on you. EXPAND = velocity >1.5x category with room to grow. AT RISK = below-average velocity with declining share. WATCH = >30% growth with above-average velocity and >$200K sales.
Deletion Risk Heatmap
Brands with the most shelf space and weakest performance metrics. Sorted by TDP (shelf footprint) descending. Counter is excluded.
